summary: Iteration 12 - Bug fix verification for Easter/checkout issues. All 5 reported bugs confirmed FIXED: 1) Landing page banner says 'HE IS RISEN! Soul Food Is LIVE!' (not Resurrection Sunday), 2) Pentecost countdown shows ~49 days (not 00:00:00:00), 3) Shipping timelines updated to '2-3 weeks' (no March/Easter dates), 4) Checkout has +/- quantity controls and trash button, 5) PaymentCancel page has 3 navigation buttons, 6) Guest checkout works for bundles (no Account Required warning).
critical_code_review_comments: SoulFoodApp.js: Pentecost countdown (May 24, 2026) working correctly - shows ~49 days
SoulFoodApp.js: Banner updated to 'HE IS RISEN! Soul Food Is LIVE!' - no Easter date reference
SoulFoodApp.js: Shipping info says 'Digital downloads available instantly' and 'Physical books ship within 2-3 weeks'
QuickOrder.js: Shipping banner says 'Ships within 2-3 weeks' - no Mar 15/Easter delivery dates
CheckoutPage.js: Quantity controls (+/- buttons) present at lines 1196-1212 with data-testid attributes
CheckoutPage.js: Guest checkout enabled - account gating disabled at lines 1043-1048
CheckoutPage.js: Shipping timeline says 'Instant download after purchase' and 'Ships within 2-3 weeks'
PaymentCancel.js: Completely rewritten with 'No Worries!' heading and 3 buttons (Return to Checkout, Continue Shopping, Back to Home)
CartContext.js: updateQuantity function at line 187 working correctly
test_credentials: Coupon codes tested: WELCOME10 (10%), SoulX1079 (15%), DOLLARTEST ($1 override)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Easter/checkout bug fixes verified. Landing page loads without crash, Pentecost countdown shows ~49 days, shipping timelines updated, checkout has quantity controls, PaymentCancel has 3 buttons, guest checkout works for bundles.

landing_page_loads.details: Landing page (/) loads without errors - no selectedSeries crash

landing_page_banner.details: Banner says 'HE IS RISEN! Soul Food Is LIVE!' (not Resurrection Sunday 2026)

pentecost_countdown.details: Countdown targets Pentecost (May 24, 2026) showing ~49 days, NOT 00:00:00:00

landing_page_shipping.details: Shipping info says 'Digital downloads available instantly' and 'Physical books ship within 2-3 weeks' (no March dates)

store_page_shipping.details: Store page (/quick-order) shipping banner says 'Ships within 2-3 weeks' (no Mar 15/Easter delivery)

checkout_guest_enabled.details: No 'Account Required' warning for bundles - guest checkout enabled

checkout_guest_flow.details: Continue as Guest flow works correctly

checkout_quantity_controls.details: Items show +/- quantity controls and trash button for removal

checkout_shipping_timeline.details: Shipping timeline says 'Instant download after purchase' and 'Ships within 2-3 weeks' (no Easter/Palm Sunday dates)

payment_cancel_page.details: Shows 'No Worries!' with 3 buttons: Return to Checkout, Continue Shopping, Back to Home

cart_persistence.details: Cart items persist in localStorage (key: soulFoodCart) across page navigations

bug_1_outdated_shipping_dates.original_issue: Shipping timeline blurbs had outdated March/Easter dates
bug_1_outdated_shipping_dates.verification: All 3 pages (landing, store, checkout) now show '2-3 weeks' without March/Easter references

bug_2_checkout_quantity_editing.original_issue: Checkout didn't allow editing item quantities (no +/- buttons)
bug_2_checkout_quantity_editing.verification: Checkout page now has +/- buttons and trash icon for each item

bug_3_payment_cancel_navigation.original_issue: PaymentCancel page had no clear 'return to cart' link
bug_3_payment_cancel_navigation.verification: PaymentCancel now has 3 buttons: Return to Checkout, Continue Shopping, Back to Home

bug_4_account_required_warning.original_issue: 'Account Required' warning blocking guest checkout for bundles
bug_4_account_required_warning.verification: Guest checkout works for all items including bundles - no account gating

bug_5_countdown_expired_date.original_issue: Landing page countdown was targeting expired Easter date
bug_5_countdown_expired_date.verification: Countdown now targets Pentecost (May 24, 2026) showing ~49 days

mocked_apis.none: All integrations are live (Stripe, Resend, MongoDB)
